name: Mascot Mines Inc.
summary: Mascot Mines Inc. owns and explores mines. The company explores gold, silver, lead, copper, and zinc ores in little Pittsburgh Mine in the Coeur d'Alene Mining District and Argentine and Edelweiss claims southeast of Helena, Montana. The company was formerly known as Mascot Silver Lead Mines, Inc. Mascot Mines Inc. was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Kellogg, Idaho.
